name: M:GTA.Native.Function.Call``1(GTA.Native.Hash,GTA.Native.InputArgument[])
summary: Calls the specified native script function and returns its return value.
returns: The return value of the native.

params.name: hash
params.description: The hashed name of the native script function.

params.name: arguments
params.description: A list of input and output arguments to pass to the native script function.
